title: Him
description: God-tier guardian entity mod for Forge 1.20.1.
body:
Him 是一款适用于 Minecraft 1.20.1 的 Forge 模组，它为游戏世界添加了一个创造者级别的守护实体。

该模组的核心是一个强大的守护者：Him 会监视附近的玩家，锁定敌对生物，惩罚威胁，并能通过救援行动打断致命攻击。其目标是让 Him 显得更加谨慎、强大，并且明显超越了普通的生存规则，而非像普通的伙伴生物那样行动。

本项目专注于守护者的行为、敌对生物的压制、救援行动的呈现以及强大的持久性。Him 的设计使其能够抵抗普通的伤害和控制，在极端情况下也能保持存在，并在玩家于世界中漫游和战斗时持续保护他们。

Him is a Forge mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that adds a creator-tier guardian entity to the world.

The mod is built around a single overwhelming protector: Him watches nearby players, targets hostile mobs, punishes threats, and can interrupt lethal attacks with a rescue execution sequence. The goal is to make Him feel deliberate, dominant, and unmistakably beyond normal survival rules instead of acting like a standard companion mob.

This project focuses on guardian behavior, hostile suppression, rescue presentation, and strong persistence. Him is designed to resist ordinary damage and control, remain present in extreme situations, and continue protecting players while roaming and fighting in the world.
